description: A designed vertical slogan/headline-collage graphic. The top half is a photograph of President Donald Trump, in a navy suit and white shirt, viewed in profile from behind as he points emphatically toward the right while leaning toward podium microphones, against a blue-curtain and red step-and-repeat backdrop. Across the center in very large bold white sans-serif caps is the slogan 'TRUST TRUMP!'. Below, on a dark navy background, three torn-paper-style clipped news headlines are arranged in a collage: a Breitbart clip ('Blockbuster Jobs Report: America Created 119,000 Jobs in September'), an ABC News clip ('Jobs report blows past expectations, defying hiring slowdown'), and a larger CBS News clip ('Employers added 119,000 jobs in September, blowing past expectations'). The technique stacks favorable mainstream and conservative news headlines around a commanding image of Trump to validate the administration's economic record and reinforce the 'TRUST TRUMP' command. Target audience: general public and supporters, promoting positive September jobs numbers.
notable_text: TRUST TRUMP!; Breitbart: Blockbuster Jobs Report: America Created 119,000 Jobs in September; ABC News: Jobs report blows past expectations, defying hiring slowdown; CBS News: Employers added 119,000 jobs in September, blowing past expectations
